rows.label: qev087006_MSG0001
rows.name:
So you want the data from
inside this, yes? That's easy.
Very very easy, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087006_MSG0002
rows.name:
That would be a huge
help, yes. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087006_MSG0003
rows.name:
For you, I'm more than happy
to help, oh yes. Least I can
do for saving my life, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087006_MSG0004
rows.name:
When you're finished, deliver
the results straight to the
director general's office, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087006_MSG0006
rows.name: All right, let's go give him our report.[ST:wait ]
